case_title: LA RUE, THADDIUS et al VS BERNAL, JEROME J

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BERNAL, JEROME J
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BERNAL, JEROME J
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LA RUE, THADDIUS MARKS, ANDREW RYAN AS TO DEFENDANT BERNAL, JEROME J ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-2006 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LA RUE, THADDIUS MARKS, ANDREW RYAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERNAL, JEROME J $1,840.52 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,890.52, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS PLAINTIFF'S SECURITY DEPOSIT REDUCED BY $180.48 PRORATED RENT, AND $179.00 FOR CLEANING. DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR $777.65 FOR PAYMENT PREVIOUSLY TENDERED TO PLAINTIFF, IF PAYMENT HAS BEEN RECEIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
